description: Sent 25 personalized messages based on conversation analysis. Messages crafted by context: active convos got natural continuations, stale convos got re-engagement hooks, WA-pending got gentle pushes with number.
hypothesis: Personalized context-aware messages outperform generic openers and template follow-ups

active.description: They replied last, we continued the conversation naturally

stale_recover.description: Conversation died, re-engaged with contextual callback

push_wa.description: Already asked for WA, pushed gently with number offer
